package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gorm_chain_built_in_service: Services that own detailed ORM query shape instead of delegating to repositories.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule058NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule058NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule058NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario058Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule058NegativeService, input Rule058NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
